title: More Tools
description: tons of new tools and features
body:
##### 🔨 This mod adds new tools for efficient work in your worlds.
---
### 🛠 Tool types:

1. **Large shovels**: break blocks in an area. Turn soil and grass into paths.  
2. **Hammers**: work like pickaxes, but over an area.  
3. **Axes**: break and chop wood over an area.  
4. **Large hoe**: plows the ground, collects and plants crops in the same place with the right mouse button. 
5. **Omni tool**: can break everything that axes, pickaxes, shovels, and hoes can break. 
6. **Broad sword**: a large and formidable weapon with high damage but low attack speed.
7. **Dagger**: a small, fast weapon, but with less damage.
---
I am looking for people to help convert the project to other engines and versions besides Fabric.

I am on Discord: [Zif_Tech](https://discord.com/users/904719438895517698)
